title: leontodon nudicalyx
intro: Leontodon nudicalyx, commonly known as Rough Hawkbit, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family. The health benefits of Leontodon nudicalyx include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate digestive issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The therapeutic actions of this plant include its use as a natural remedy for treating skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. The bioactive constituents of Leontodon nudicalyx include sesquiterpene lactones, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its therapeutic properties.
side_effects: Leontodon nudicalyx can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and swelling. Ingesting the plant's leaves or flowers can cause gastrointestinal issues, such as nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. Excessive consumption may also lead to headaches, dizziness, and fatigue. Additionally, improper use of Leontodon nudicalyx may interact with medications, exacerbating conditions like high blood pressure and heart disease.
